## Epic

Integration

## Description

- Simulate event stream for deposits, withdrawals, and rebalancing
- Update dashboard widgets without full refresh
- Show toast notifications for important events

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Simulated realtime event stream established
- [ ] Portfolio updates live
- [ ] Notifications displayed for major events
- [ ] Start/stop/reset controls implemented for demo/testing
